Reviews Contact

About The Fence Man

12+ years serving Nashville and surrounding areas

The Fence Man started with a simple goal: to provide Nashville homeowners and businesses with superior fencing solutions built to last. Founded by a Tennessee native with a passion for craftsmanship, we understand the unique challenges our local climate presents – from the humid summers to the occasional ice storms.

We believe in doing things right the first time. Our team is committed to using only the highest quality materials and proven installation techniques. We take pride in our work, ensuring every fence we build is strong, secure, and aesthetically pleasing.

We're more than just a fencing company; we're part of the Nashville community. We believe in giving back, supporting local charities, and building lasting relationships with our clients. When you choose The Fence Man, you're choosing a neighbor who cares.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
The Fence Man

Trusted fence contractor professionals serving Nashville, TN and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
